t_delay_smoke.cir.rationale: Single T-line smoke deck; keep a loose first-pass transport-delay threshold until delayed-line semantics mature further.

include_delay_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt T-line smoke deck used to keep transport-delay behavior under file-backed hierarchy flattening inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

include_chain_delay_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Chained-include delayed-T subckt smoke deck used to keep transport-delay behavior under include-of-include hierarchy flattening inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

include_chain_delay_source_pwl_subckt_sm.rationale: Chained-include delayed-T deck with a file-driven PWL source used to keep transport-delay behavior and source-file locality coupled under include-of-include hierarchy flattening inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

include_delay_source_pwl_subckt_smoke.ci.rationale: Included subckt delayed-T deck with a file-driven PWL source used to keep transport-delay behavior and source-file locality coupled under file-backed hierarchy flattening inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

k_mutual_smoke.cir.rationale: Mutual-inductor smoke deck used to catch coupling regressions without overfitting the current linear transient approximation.

include_k_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt mutual-inductor smoke deck used to keep coupling behavior under file-backed hierarchy flattening inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

include_chain_k_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Chained-include mutual-inductor smoke deck used to keep coupling behavior under include-of-include hierarchy flattening inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

include_chain_source_k_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Chained-include mutual-inductor deck with an internal pulse source used to keep coupling behavior and source-bearing include-of-include hierarchy coupled inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

include_chain_source_pwl_k_jj_subckt_smo.rationale: Chained-include JJ deck with an internal file-driven source-bearing mutual-inductor path; keeps nonlinear model lookup, mutual-coupling semantics, and source-file locality coupled under include-of-include hierarchy semantics.

include_source_k_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt mutual-inductor deck with an internal pulse source used to keep coupling behavior and source-bearing hierarchy coupled inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

include_source_pwl_k_jj_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt JJ deck with an internal file-driven source-bearing mutual-inductor path; keeps nonlinear model lookup, mutual-coupling semantics, and source-file locality coupled inside file-backed hierarchy semantics.

include_source_k_jj_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt JJ deck with an internal source-bearing mutual-inductor path; keeps nonlinear model lookup and mutual-coupling semantics coupled inside file-backed hierarchy semantics.

include_chain_source_k_jj_subckt_smoke.c.rationale: Chained-include JJ deck with an internal source-bearing mutual-inductor path in the leaf included file; keeps nonlinear model lookup and mutual-coupling semantics coupled under include-of-include hierarchy flattening.

jj_minimal_smoke.cir.rationale: Bootstrap nonlinear JJ deck using inline instance parameters; threshold remains looser than passive cases because internal JJ semantics are still partial relative to JoSIM.

jj_model_keyword_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that references a `.model ... jj(...)` card through `model=...`, used to keep the external JoSIM translator aligned on keyword-style model references instead of silently falling back to default JJ semantics.

jj_modelname_keyword_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that references a `.model ... jj(...)` card through `modelname=...`, used to keep the internal parser and external JoSIM translator aligned on the alternate keyword-style model reference path instead of only covering `model=...`.

jj_model_override_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that references a `.model ... jj(...)` card and overrides `rn` at the instance site, used to keep the external JoSIM translator aligned on the supported model-default-plus-inline-override subset instead of falling back to default model semantics.

jj_pi_model_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises supported `pi` sign-flip semantics through both a `.model ... jj(...)` card and an instance-side `pi=1` override, used to keep the external JoSIM translator aligned on preserved pi-junction behavior instead of degrading it to warnings.

jj_pi_warning_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises nonzero integer `pi` spellings through a `.model ... jj(...)` default of `pi=-1` plus an instance-side `pi=2` override, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now covers the real JoSIM-compatible integer forms that the translator and internal parser normalize into sign-flip semantics.

jj_second_harmonic_model_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises supported second-harmonic CPR lowering through a `.model ... jj(...)` card plus an instance-side `icrit2` override, used to keep the external JoSIM translator aligned on native JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission instead of degrading second-harmonic semantics to warnings.

jj_second_harmonic_model_override_smoke..rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises supported second-harmonic CPR lowering through `.model ... jj(...)` defaults while also overriding `rn` at the instance site, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers the current benchmark-safe model-default-plus-inline-override merge path without dropping harmonic CPR semantics.

jj_third_harmonic_model_override_smoke.c.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises supported third-harmonic CPR lowering through `.model ... jj(...)` defaults while also overriding `rn` at the instance site, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers the current benchmark-safe model-default-plus-inline-override merge path for three-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission without dropping harmonic semantics.

jj_third_harmonic_model_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises newly supported third-harmonic CPR lowering through a `.model ... jj(...)` card plus an instance-side `icrit3` override, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers three-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission instead of stopping at second harmonic.

jj_fourth_harmonic_model_override_smoke..rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises supported fourth-harmonic CPR lowering through `.model ... jj(...)` defaults while also overriding `rn` at the instance site, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers the current benchmark-safe model-default-plus-inline-override merge path for four-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission without dropping harmonic semantics.

jj_fourth_harmonic_model_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises newly supported fourth-harmonic CPR lowering through a `.model ... jj(...)` card plus an instance-side `icrit4` override, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now covers four-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission instead of stopping at third harmonic.

jj_fifth_harmonic_model_override_smoke.c.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises supported fifth-harmonic CPR lowering through `.model ... jj(...)` defaults while also overriding `rn` at the instance site, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers the current benchmark-safe model-default-plus-inline-override merge path for five-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission without dropping harmonic semantics.

jj_fifth_harmonic_model_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises newly supported fifth-harmonic CPR lowering through a `.model ... jj(...)` card plus an instance-side `icrit5` override, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now covers five-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission through alias lowering instead of stopping at fourth harmonic.

jj_sixth_harmonic_model_override_smoke.c.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises supported sixth-harmonic CPR lowering through `.model ... jj(...)` defaults while also overriding `rn` at the instance site, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers the current benchmark-safe model-default-plus-inline-override merge path for six-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission without dropping harmonic semantics.

jj_sixth_harmonic_model_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises newly supported sixth-harmonic CPR lowering through a `.model ... jj(...)` card plus an instance-side `icrit6` override, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now covers six-coefficient JoSIM `CPR={...}` emission through alias lowering instead of stopping at fifth harmonic.

jj_sixth_harmonic_pure_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises pure sixth-harmonic semantics without any primary `icrit` term, so the numeric phase-6 baseline starts covering native JoSIM `CPR={0,0,0,0,0,1}` emission when the sixth harmonic is the only available basis current.

jj_native_cpr_model_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises native `.model ... jj(... cpr={...})` input through the first three harmonic coefficients, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers direct JoSIM-style CPR syntax instead of only alias-based `icrit2`/`icrit3` lowering.

jj_native_cpr_model_fourth_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises native `.model ... jj(... cpr={...})` input through four coefficients, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now covers direct JoSIM-style fourth-harmonic CPR syntax on model cards instead of stopping at the third harmonic.

jj_native_cpr_model_fifth_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises native `.model ... jj(... cpr={...})` input through five coefficients, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now starts covering fifth-harmonic JoSIM-style CPR syntax on model cards instead of stopping at the fourth term.

jj_native_cpr_model_override_fifth_smoke.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises native `.model ... jj(... cpr={...})` input through five coefficients while also overriding `rn` at the instance site, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers the supported model-default-plus-inline-override merge path for full five-coefficient native JoSIM CPR syntax without degrading model-card defaults.

jj_native_cpr_instance_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises native instance-side `J... cpr={...}` input with inline `icrit`/`rn`/`cj` through the first three harmonic coefficients, so the numeric phase-6 baseline covers direct JoSIM-style CPR syntax on junction instances instead of only model-card defaults.

jj_native_cpr_instance_fourth_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises native instance-side `J... cpr={...}` input through four coefficients with inline `icrit`/`rn`/`cj`, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now covers direct JoSIM-style fourth-harmonic CPR syntax on junction instances instead of stopping at the third harmonic.

jj_native_cpr_instance_fifth_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises native instance-side `J... cpr={...}` input through five coefficients with inline `icrit`/`rn`/`cj`, so the numeric phase-6 baseline now starts covering fifth-harmonic JoSIM-style CPR syntax on junction instances instead of stopping at the fourth term.

jj_fifth_harmonic_pure_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises pure fifth-harmonic semantics without any primary `icrit` term, so the numeric phase-6 baseline starts covering native JoSIM `CPR={0,0,0,0,1}` emission when the fifth harmonic is the only available basis current.

jj_fourth_harmonic_pure_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises pure fourth-harmonic semantics without any primary `icrit` term, so the numeric phase-6 baseline starts covering native JoSIM `CPR={0,0,0,1}` emission when the fourth harmonic is the only available basis current.

jj_third_harmonic_pure_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that exercises pure third-harmonic semantics without any primary `icrit` term, so the numeric phase-6 baseline starts covering native JoSIM `CPR={0,0,1}` emission when the third harmonic is the only available basis current.

jj_second_harmonic_warning_smoke.cir.rationale: Top-level JJ deck that now exercises pure second-harmonic semantics without any primary `icrit` term, using a tighter transient step so both internal transient and external JoSIM can keep this previously warning-only boundary inside the numeric phase-6 baseline.

include_jj_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt JJ deck with a model card defined in the included file; keeps file-backed model resolution and hierarchy flattening inside the first nonlinear JJ baseline.

include_source_pwl_jj_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt JJ deck with an internal file-driven PWL source; keeps nonlinear model lookup and source-file locality coupled inside file-backed hierarchy semantics.

include_delay_source_pwl_k_jj_subckt_smo.rationale: Included subckt JJ deck with an internal delayed-T path driven by a file-driven PWL source and feeding a mutual-inductor path; keeps nonlinear model lookup, transport-delay semantics, mutual-coupling semantics, and source-file locality coupled inside file-backed hierarchy semantics.

include_chain_delay_jj_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Chained-include JJ deck with an internal delayed-T source path in the leaf included file; keeps nonlinear model lookup and transport-delay semantics coupled under include-of-include hierarchy flattening.

include_chain_jj_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Chained-include JJ deck with the model card defined in the leaf included file; keeps nonlinear model lookup and include-of-include hierarchy flattening inside the JJ baseline.

include_chain_source_jj_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Chained-include JJ deck with an internal pulse source in the leaf included file; keeps nonlinear model lookup and source-bearing include-of-include hierarchy coupled inside the JJ baseline.

include_chain_source_pwl_jj_subckt_smoke.rationale: Chained-include JJ deck with an internal file-driven PWL source in the leaf included file; keeps nonlinear model lookup and source-file locality coupled under include-of-include hierarchy flattening inside the JJ baseline.

pulse_rc_smoke.cir.rationale: Pulse-driven passive RC smoke deck used to keep a first waveform-source baseline in the JoSIM correlation gate without requiring JJ-specific semantics.

exp_alias_source_smoke.cir.rationale: Exponential passive RC smoke deck used to keep alias-style `EXP(low=... high=... delay1=... tau_rise=... delay2=... tau_fall=...)` source parsing and external JoSIM deck lowering aligned in the thresholded waveform baseline.

pulse_keyword_mixed_case_comma_source_sm.rationale: Pulse-driven passive RC smoke deck used to keep mixed-case comma-separated keyword-style `pUlSe(v1=..., v2=..., td=..., tr=..., tf=..., pw=..., per=..., ncycles=...)` source parsing and external JoSIM deck lowering aligned in the thresholded waveform baseline.

exp_rc_smoke.cir.rationale: Exponential passive RC smoke deck used to keep rise-and-fall source shaping in the first thresholded waveform-source baseline.

exp_keyword_source_smoke.cir.rationale: Exponential passive RC smoke deck used to keep keyword-style `EXP(v1=... v2=... td1=... tau1=... td2=... tau2=...)` source parsing and external JoSIM deck lowering aligned in the thresholded waveform baseline.

exp_keyword_comma_source_smoke.cir.rationale: Exponential passive RC smoke deck used to keep comma-separated keyword-style `EXP(v1=..., v2=..., td1=..., tau1=..., td2=..., tau2=...)` source parsing and external JoSIM deck lowering aligned in the thresholded waveform baseline.

pwl_file_rc_smoke.cir.rationale: File-driven PWL passive RC smoke deck used to keep external waveform-file resolution and source playback inside the first thresholded waveform-source baseline.

include_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Included subckt passive RC smoke deck used to keep file-backed include expansion and parameterized subckt flattening inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

nested_subckt_smoke.cir.rationale: Nested included subckt passive RC smoke deck used to keep parameter passthrough across flattened hierarchy inside the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

lib_sec_equals_attached_value_smoke.cir.rationale: Library-section passive RC smoke deck used to keep `.lib <path> sec =...` tokenization (value attached to the equals token) aligned in the thresholded phase-6 baseline.

sin_keyword_mixed_case_space_before_pare.rationale: Sine-wave passive RC smoke deck used to keep mixed-case keyword spelling (sIn) and space-before-paren form parsing coupled in the thresholded waveform baseline.
